privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a Technology Radar diagram with 20 real-world technologies: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), Platform Engineering, Continuous Compliance, Design Tokens, Long-lived Feature Branches, Renovate, GitHub Actions, Backstage, dbt (Data Build Tool), Terraform Cloud, Kubernetes, Cloudflare Workers, Databricks Unity Catalog, Fly.io, Azure DevOps, TypeScript, Rust, htmx, LangChain, and Mojo. All 20 technologies are verified to be real, existing tools/frameworks used in the software industry. The task requires applying 4 specific fill colors based on movement status: Green (#00CC00) for New, Blue (#3399FF) for Moved In, Orange (#FF9900) for Moved Out, and Gray (#CCCCCC) for No Change. The underlying data is synthetic—generated by the task setup script (setup_task.sh) and not sourced from an actual organization's technology radar. The template file, assessment data, and expected output paths are correctly specified and match the setup script implementation.
